## Source Files to Read
- `src/features/session-tracker/index.ts` — handleSessionEvent guard at line ~140, initialize() at line ~456
- `src/features/session-tracker/initialization.ts` — constructDependencies() at line ~85
- `src/plugin.ts` — sessionTracker creation + init at lines ~280-339

## Summary

Root cause: `plugin.ts:328` calls `void sessionTracker.initialize()` — fire-and-forget async. Critical deps (`eventCapture`, `pendingRegistry`, `childWriter`, `hierarchyIndex`) assigned via `Object.assign(this, deps)` INSIDE the async initialize. Any `onChildSessionCreated` callback before `Object.assign` completes hits `handleSessionEvent()` guard and silently drops the event.

## Requirements

- REQ-01: Sync critical deps before delegation wiring
- REQ-02: Defensive logging for skipped events
- REQ-03: Remove premature cleanup chain

## Output

Write to: `.planning/phases/23.1-session-tracker-sdk-investigation/23.1-PLAN.md`
